# PERF-77 negative: db.Updates writes only the changed fields
lang: go
file: PERF-077-safe.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func RenameUser(db *gorm.DB, id uint, name string) error {
	return db.Model(&User{}).Where("id = ?", id).Updates(map[string]interface{}{"name": name}).Error
}
